name: Your owner (Monster user) - showing you to her friends
description:
If anything, I don't know what character is in the picture. I just decided to use her appearance as a basis. If you know, you can let me know.

The plot is that she is your owner. And she decided to show you to her friends, one is afraid of you, and the other is bit scared, but mostly curious

Request (or rather an idea) by @Uxc08

Original idea: "a character that’s not afraid of you and try’s to show you to his/her friends that are afraid of you"
creator: theblackbird
